contentBlocks.original:
मङ्गलं भगवान् विष्णुः मङ्गलं गरुडध्वजः।
मङ्गलं पुण्डरीकाक्षो मङ्गलाय तनो हरिः॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
maṅgalaṃ bhagavān viṣṇuḥ maṅgalaṃ garuḍadhvajaḥ .
maṅgalaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣo maṅgalāya tano hariḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation:
Auspicious is Lord Vishnu, auspicious is the one who has Garuda on his flag.
Auspicious is the lotus-eyed one, may Lord Hari bestow auspiciousness upon us.
contentBlocks.meanings: मङ्गलं (maṅgalaṃ) – auspicious; भगवान् (bhagavān) – Lord; विष्णुः (viṣṇuḥ) – Vishnu; मङ्गलं (maṅgalaṃ) – auspicious; गरुडध्वजः (garuḍadhvajaḥ) – one with Garuda on flag (garuḍa:Garuda | dhvajaḥ:flag); मङ्गलं (maṅgalaṃ) – auspicious; पुण्डरीकाक्षः (puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ) – lotus-eyed one (puṇḍarīka:lotus | akṣaḥ:eye); मङ्गलाय (maṅgalāya) – for auspiciousness; तनः (tanaḥ) – body; हरिः (hariḥ) – Hari;
